reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención...!!! Maxikiosko muy surtido. Cambio de aceite y lubricentro. Acepta tarjetas de débito y crédito. Ubicado en pleno centro de Avellaneda en la Av. Mitre cerca de la plaza... a 2 minutos de capital federal.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! A well-stocked convenience store. Oil change and lubrication services. Accepts debit and credit cards. Located in the heart of Avellaneda on Av. Mitre, near the main square... 2 minutes from Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3c1BqZTBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Genial. Necesitamos atención e información de caminos, nos atendieron muy bien, nos aconsejaron con mucha certeza. Gracias,  sin la tranquilidad que nos dieron jamás hubieramos transitado caminos de paisajes único.  Consejo...la 40 es de ripio pero se puede hacer sin problemas, no se lo pierdan.

(Translated by Google)
Fantastic! We needed assistance and information about the roads, and they treated us very well, giving us very accurate advice. Thank you; without the peace of mind they provided, we would never have traveled along roads with such unique scenery. Tip... Route 40 is gravel, but it's perfectly manageable; don't miss it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJcnB5eWlnRRAB

Muy buena atención del personal.

Being a member offers several benefits, such as free parking, discounts at the confectionery shop, and more.
The staff provides excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Atienden pesimo como en todo Salta. Los salteños son lo más groseros que he conocido. Espantan al turista. Me da vergüenza como argentina tener en nta geografía una provincia que atienda tan mal al turista.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, just like everywhere else in Salta. The people of Salta are the rudest I've ever met. They scare away tourists. As an Argentinian, I'm ashamed to have a province in such a vast region that treats tourists so badly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3cHQzSUhREAE
